title: rosmarinus × lavandulaceus var. noeanus
intro: Rosmarinus × lavandulaceus var. noeanus is a hybrid plant species of rosemary, specifically a cross between Rosmarinus officinalis and Lavandula latifolia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and aiding in digestion. Rosmarinus × lavandulaceus var. noeanus can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or dried herb for use in cooking and traditional medicine.
